hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get(\"file_path\",\"\"); print(f)" | grep -q "\.rs$" && cd "/Users/toshiki.hirata/Documents/CLAUDE APP/ticktask/src-tauri" && cargo fmt --quiet 2>/dev/null || true'

bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get(\"file_path\",\"\"); print(f)" | grep -qE "\.(tsx?|jsx?)$" && cd "/Users/toshiki.hirata/Documents/CLAUDE APP/ticktask" && npx prettier --write "$(echo \"$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT\" | python3 -c \"import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\\\"file_path\\\",\\\"\\\"))\")" 2>/dev/null || true'

bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get(\"command\",\"\"); banned=[\"cargo publish\",\"npm publish\",\"rm -rf /\",\"rm -rf ~\"]; [sys.exit(2) for b in banned if b in cmd]" 2>/dev/null || true'

bash -c 'cd "/Users/toshiki.hirata/Documents/CLAUDE APP/ticktask" && cat > docs/SESSION-HANDOFF.md << EOF
# Session Handoff

Last updated: $(date)

## Current Phase

See CLAUDE.md Development Phases for progress.

## Last Actions

Session ended. Check git log for recent changes.

## Next Steps

Resume from the last incomplete phase in CLAUDE.md.
EOF'
